Markdown body text check types › Single H1

kind:    markdown_single_h1
family:  markdownBodyText
scope:   item
severity: error
purpose: Require that the markdown body contains at most one H1 heading.

Markdown body-text check types validate relationships between frontmatter metadata and markdown body content.

This check type takes no configuration keys.

example:
  collections:
    notes:
      path: notes
      checks:
        - kind: markdown_single_h1

other markdown body text check types:
  markdown_code_fence_language_required, markdown_no_heading_level_jumps, markdown_required_section, markdown_requires_h1, markdown_title_matches_h1, markdown_writing_tells
